creator: p.schack@kapricorne.net
text:
Hi,

I have made some more tests.
I have reinstalled the old FreeBSD 6.2 Hard disk in my computer and launche=
d xorg (older version 6.8 or 6.9 ?).
The problem is the same than with the FreeBSD 7.0 installation.
This version was running on a MSI motherboard without any problem until the=
 motherboard died.
The problem is about xorg and the new motherboard (Asus P5KPL-VM) ?.
